# proof-pilot-codes evaluation harness

The files under `evaluation/`, `evaluation_local/`, and
`distill_gen/math_3r/` were imported from:

- Repository: https://github.com/ycchen-tw/proof-pilot-codes
- Commit: `bc03a2c`
- License: Apache License 2.0 (see `LICENSE` in this directory)

Historical evaluation outputs and training-only parquet datasets were not
imported. Local serving, sharding, validation, and result-recording changes are
maintained in this repository.
